title: carex divulsa var. pairae
intro: Carex divulsa var. pairae, also known as the variegated tussock sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The medicinal properties of Carex divulsa var. pairae include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Carex divulsa var. pairae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and utilize its health benefits.
